headline: How The Cisco Systems (CSCO) Investment Story Is Shifting On Growth Hopes And Margin Risks
summary: Cisco Systems is back in focus as analysts update their models, with some bullish firms lifting their price targets by about US$5 while the central fair value anchor is kept at US$88.81. Those higher targets sit alongside mixed Street commentary, where one camp points to long term growth potential and another highlights concerns around margins and costs. As you read on, you will see how these shifting views can help you track the evolving narrative around Cisco and what it might mean for your...

headline: Is Citigroup (C) Pricing Reflect Its Restructuring Progress And Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: If you are wondering whether Citigroup at around US$106.53 is offering genuine value or just looks cheap on the surface, you are not alone. The stock has seen a 4.4% decline over the last 7 days and a 13.2% decline over the last 30 days, yet it still shows a 62.1% return over 1 year and a 164.3% return over 3 years, which can change how investors think about both risk and opportunity. Recent headlines have focused on Citigroup's ongoing restructuring efforts and business simplification...

headline: The Winners and Losers of Monday's Selloff
summary: Cruise operators, airlines and bank stocks fell in premarket trading Monday, while energy companies rallied.  As markets brace for a more protracted conflict in the Middle East, investors are rushing to identify the winners and losers from the most severe shock to energy markets since the 1970s.  Travel companies are leading losses in premarket U.S. trading.

headline: Micron Stock Continues to Slide. Why Earnins Could Change That.
summary: Micron Technology  stock was on track for a third consecutive decline Monday as investors digested some mixed news ahead of the memory supplier’s March 18 earnings report.  The good: Analysts at two Wall Street firms reiterated Buy-equivalent ratings and boosted their price targets for the stock, arguing that the memory demand cycle is still on the way up.  Micron shares were down 1.2% to $365.81 in premarket trading.

headline: Citi Issues Inaugural Digitally Native Structured Note on Euroclear's D-FMI DLT Platform
summary: LUXEMBOURG, March 09, 2026--Citi has issued its first digitally native structured note on Euroclear’s Digital Financial Market Infrastructure platform. This transaction marks a debut of a digitally native structured note being issued on Euroclear’s D-FMI and represents the first of its kind being offered within the wealth management industry.

headline: How The Story Is Shifting For News Corp (NWSA) As Analysts Recalibrate Valuation
summary: The latest update keeps model fair value for News at $34.05 per share, with recent price targets being trimmed around the edges rather than reset. Analysts link these small target moves to tweaks in inputs, suggesting they are fine tuning assumptions instead of changing their core view of the business. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these shifts and keep track of how the narrative around News evolves over time. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story. Head...
